description.ko: 심우주의 특이점 주변에서 왜곡되는 빛과 가스를 통해 우주의 무한한 침묵과 장엄함을 묘사.
description.en: A majestic exploration of the cosmic abyss, showing the distortion of light and gas around a central singularity.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-realistic wide shot of VOID-3, titled 'The Singularity’s Veil.' A massive gravitational anomaly in deep space, swirling #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo gravitational gases into a #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds drift in the background as gravitational lensing distorts distant stars. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, capturing the silent, terrifying majesty of the infinite universe.
